verse.name: v1
verse.lines: There's a precious hiding place, In Jesus side, In Jesus side, There's a cleft of heavenly grace, In Jesus side, In Jesus side, There's a shelter from all sin, From all doubt and from all fear, All the world may enter in, In Jesus side, In Jesus side.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: This precious place was bought for me, By Jesus blood shed on the cross, He died for me on Calvary, To set me free and make me whole. There's a shelter from all sin, From all doubt and from all fear, All the world may enter in, In Jesus side, In Jesus side.
